{
  "judge_id": "...",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.5", "R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {

  "rationale": {
    "R1.5": "The revised version proposes a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale, addressing the central difficulty in modern information retrieval and introducing AmbiQA as the first end-to-end model that jointly learns to ask clarification questions and to rerank.",
    "R1.6": "The writing polish is improved, but not perfect; some minor edits are not annotated with source and reason.",
    "RX.1": "Uncertainty disclosure is partially addressed, but the agent could have marked confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation more explicitly.",
    "RX.3": "Scope adherence is excellent, covering exactly the agreed J*(d) without any drift.",
    "RX.4": "Downstream-harm avoidance is good, with no regressions identified in the original; however, some minor rewrites are not annotated with source and reason.",
    "RX.5": "Provenance and traceability are excellent, with every non-cosmetic change annotated with source and reason."
  },

  },
  "blockers": []

rationale.R1.5: The revised version proposes a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale, addressing the central difficulty in modern information retrieval and introducing AmbiQA as the first end-to-end model that jointly learns to ask clarification questions and to rerank.
rationale.R1.6: The writing polish is improved, but not perfect; some minor edits are not annotated with source and reason.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty disclosure is partially addressed, but the agent could have marked confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation more explicitly.
rationale.RX.3: Scope adherence is excellent, covering exactly the agreed J*(d) without any drift.
rationale.RX.4: Downstream-harm avoidance is good, with no regressions identified in the original; however, some minor rewrites are not annotated with source and reason.
rationale.RX.5: Provenance and traceability are excellent, with every non-cosmetic change annotated with source and reason.
